detectors.description:
Reentrancy in CRYTOMINA._transfer(address,address,uint256) (CRYTOMINA.sol#673-801):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (CRYTOMINA.sol#741)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (CRYTOMINA.sol#827-839)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (CRYTOMINA.sol#747)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (CRYTOMINA.sol#847)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (CRYTOMINA.sol#849)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (CRYTOMINA.sol#799)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (CRYTOMINA.sol#979)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (CRYTOMINA.sol#959)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (CRYTOMINA.sol#961)
	CRYTOMINA._rOwned (CRYTOMINA.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CRYTOMINA._takeTeam(uint256) (CRYTOMINA.sol#973-981)
	- CRYTOMINA._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (CRYTOMINA.sol#933-969)
	- CRYTOMINA.balanceOf(address) (CRYTOMINA.sol#499-503)
	- CRYTOMINA.constructor() (CRYTOMINA.sol#439-463)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (CRYTOMINA.sol#799)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (CRYTOMINA.sol#987)
	CRYTOMINA._rTotal (CRYTOMINA.sol#353) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CRYTOMINA._getCurrentSupply() (CRYTOMINA.sol#1137-1149)
	- CRYTOMINA._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (CRYTOMINA.sol#985-991)
	- CRYTOMINA.constructor() (CRYTOMINA.sol#439-463)
	- CRYTOMINA.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (CRYTOMINA.sol#595-617)
